text:
Once upon a time, there was a small town nestled by a tranquil lake. The residents loved their quiet life, except for one boy named Oliver. Oliver loved adventure, far-off places, and secret languages.

One autumn evening, as the leaves drifted through golden air, Oliver found a mysterious book hidden behind a bookshelf in the town's old library. Inside were pages filled with odd runes, bizarre symbols, and ancient poetry that seemed to whisper secrets untold.

That night, something strange seemed to pass through the library walls. Objects floated mid-air, and the book lay open with no visible sign of a previous reader. Oliver studied its pages, fascinated by a passage describing a journey to a land of talking beasts where laughter could heal any ailment. With a notebook by his side, he began his imaginary journey.

The next day, Oliver borrowed bikes from every neighbor. They rode further north than anyone had ever gone before. Birds sang in octaves unheard of, and streams ran with crystals of
